classObjective: Solve problems involving complementary, supplementary, and vertical angle relationships using algebra.
workedExamples: 11-2, Example 1 — Solve Problems Using Complementary and Supplementary Angles
warmUp: If two angles are supplementary and one is 110°, what is the other?
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: complementary (sum 90°); supplementary (sum 180°); vertical angles (congruent); algebraic relationships
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice solving problems with complementary, supplementary, and vertical angle relationships
independentPractice: Practice problems using angle relationships to find unknown measures
assessment: Exit ticket: find both angles if they are supplementary and one is 3 times the other
capReflection: Why are vertical angles always congruent?
